name: Pumpkin Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large bowl, combine the pumpkin pie filling, baking soda, milk, sugar, eggs, vegetable oil, flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, and vanilla extract. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly incorporated.
3. Fold in the chocolate chips.
4. Drop rounded spoonfuls of the dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
5. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove from the oven and allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
